title: Fox's Lichcraft
body:
Fox's Lichcraft is a Fabric mod with one main goal: become an immortal lich through the harnessing of souls. This is done by crafting a **Phylactery**, then harvesting and feeding it souls from innocent creatures (and other players!).

Souls can be harvested by dropping a **Soul Masher** on most creatures, or by killing them with a **Potion of Reaping**. Once your phylactery is fueled, you will teleport to its location instead of dying. Use this as a way to avoid death in a hardcore world or to never lose your stuff again!

Current plans:

- More soul harvesting methods
- More uses for souls
